name: kosmos-oden
description: Kosmos-Oden (Vault Kosmos v0.5.5) — a 3D Local Cluster view of a Markdown knowledge base, with a shared Kosmos Core powering the Obsidian plugin, the standalone HTML viewer, the Agent API (REST + MCP), the Graphiti exporter, and the kosmos-build CLI.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && npm run check:versions && npm run check:artifacts && npm run check:invariants

author: OdenKnight
